label: Scratch PROTOTYPE BROWSER-BASED DIAGNOST…
title: Scratch
innerText:
Scratch
PROTOTYPE

BROWSER-BASED DIAGNOSTIC TOOLS

00
Location History Map
Real-time GPS position display with interactive Leaflet map
01
Microphone Diagnostics
Microphone testing, audio visualization, and recording
02
Reflection Blur
Depth-based planar reflection blur effect
03
Texture-Space Shading
WebGL2 texture-space shading with debug atlas views
04
SH Lightmap
Per-object L1 spherical-harmonic lightmap for N-light shading at constant cost
05
Base64
Encode and decode base64 with JSON pretty-printing
06
GPU Benchmark
WebGPU/WebGL fillrate, ALU, texture, vertex, and draw-call bench
07
LM Studio Manager
List, load, and unload local LLMs; basic streaming test chat
08
Ollama Manager
List, pull, and delete Ollama models; basic streaming test chat
09
Mesh Subdivision
Adaptive ground-mesh subdivision: compare triangulation strategies and watch T-junctions appear or vanish
10
Volumetric Fog
Ray-marched volumetric fog with FBM density, depth occlusion, and sun scattering
